text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Die <BIBL><TITLE>Mangoldische Bibel</TITLE> <YEAR>1729</YEAR></BIBL>. Die <BIBL><TITLE>Jelische Lexicon</TITLE> <VOLUME>4. Daniel Meyer" in <PERSNAME> tags, as this is clearly a person's name acting as a bookseller/commissioner.
